basic_details.job_title: IIM Udaipur Head Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Head - Admissions Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIM Udaipur website. The last date to submit the application form is 01-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree or equivalent in any discipline from a recognized university.
qualification.details: Post Name: Head - Admissions Qualifications: Postgraduate degree or equivalent in any discipline from a recognized university. Experience: Candidates should have proven experience in: Designing and implementing admissions strategies and policies. Managing end-to-end admission processes Leading student recruitment initiatives, marketing campaigns, and outreach activities. Coordinating with faculty, academic departments, and external agencies. Managing admission analytics, applicant databases, and CRM systems. Supervising and mentoring admissions teams. Ensuring compliance with institutional policies and regulatory requirements.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Udaipur Head - Admissions Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Udaipur to complete the application.
